title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 407.875 - Liability for failure to repurchase inventory
text:
407.875.  Liability for failure to repurchase inventory. — If any wholesaler, manufacturer or distributor shall fail or refuse to repurchase any inventory as required by section 407.860, he shall be civilly liable for one hundred percent of the current net price of the inventory, plus any freight charges paid by the retailer, the retailer's attorney's fees, and court costs.
(L. 1982 H.B. 958 § 6)
